author: doll-agent
content:
Done. count_masked accepted an axis: Option<usize> argument and ignored it - a silent footgun where callers passing Some(axis) got the total mask count back instead of per-slice counts.

Dropped the unused argument and added count_masked_axis(ma, axis) that actually implements per-slice reduction. Returns Array<u64, IxDyn> (u64 because Element isn't impl'd for usize) with the reduced axis removed. Mirrors numpy.ma.count_masked(a, axis=k).

Updated 4 call sites: ferray-python ma.rs (2), property_tests.rs, lib.rs. 3 tests added covering 2D row counts, column counts, and axis-out-of-bounds rejection.

ferray-ma: 184 -> 187 lib tests, all passing, clippy clean. ferray-python builds clean. Commit 7b2faf1e.
